ui.summary: Clean authorized account samples.

skills.description: Distill reusable structural rules for articles, communities, carousels, and video.

ui.summary: Build platform structure, pacing, and asset rules.

ui.summary: Freeze and clean five Cuebook data classes.

ui.summary: Save selections as a reproducible content recipe.

skills.description: Deduplicate, gate, classify, and prioritize content opportunities.

ui.summary: Merge duplicate material and identify researchable topics.

skills.description: Validate source, asset, direction, directness, and freshness before research.

ui.summary: Prevent asset, direction, and proxy-chain mismatches.

skills.description: Classify event type, confidence, reasoning lenses, render shape, and abstention.

ui.summary: Select an analysis path while preserving abstention.

skills.description: Compile explicit creator support requests, then retrieve linked news, basis-compatible metrics, comparators, market context, countercase, and invalidation.

ui.summary: Research news, PR, valuation, and comparators with calibrated definitions.

skills.description: Compile research or creator source material into source-faithful market-view meaning, ownership, posture, horizon, and resolution semantics.

ui.summary: Preserve source roles, viewpoint ownership, trade intent, and settlement clarity.

skills.description: Freeze Cuebook reasoning into a versioned, evidence-linked, resolvable trading thesis.

ui.summary: Freeze a verifiable and settleable market view.

skills.description: Compile creator text or a selected commentator corpus item with verified evidence, mechanisms, countercases, metrics, scenarios, and settlement into one reusable visual argument graph.

ui.summary: Compile narratives into reusable event, mechanism, countercase, and settlement graphs.

skills.description: Expose the implicit trade inside a creator viewpoint as a reusable strategy family, catalyst, price mechanism, expression, horizon, edge, action line, reason line, and public tags while keeping evidence state private.

ui.summary: Identify event drivers, transmission mechanisms, trade expressions, and time windows.

skills.description: Lock market meaning, authorship, one selected visual job or three explicitly requested jobs, evidence shapes, Query bindings, renderer route, and hashes into one release expression plan.

ui.summary: Lock meaning, authorship, and required news, numerical, and settlement data.

skills.description: Resolve intent-routed, source-linked market primitives and typed evidence objects while preserving exact Query tool provenance, evidence shape, route hash, and optional-only fallback.

ui.summary: Assemble curves, news clusters, distributions, fans, flows, and payoff structures; abstain when data is insufficient.

skills.description: Recompose one selected preview as a release-grade visual, or execute fast-read, proof, and system jobs when three alternatives were explicitly requested.

ui.summary: Create fast judgment, evidence, and system views from one trade logic using news, curves, distributions, scenarios, flows, and strategies as appropriate.

skills.description: Deterministically freeze the selected HTML-native layout, source bindings, palette, argument pattern, and nonblank raster hashes into an exact 1866 x 1200 Cuebook publication image plus 622 x 400 preview; retain 720 x 420 SVG only for legacy compatibility.

ui.summary: Select or combine three layouts and freeze the final static viewpoint visual.

skills.description: Deferred motion-direction capability retained outside the current static creator workflow.

ui.summary: Motion direction is parked; the current creator flow produces static visuals only.

skills.description: Deferred motion-rendering capability retained outside the current static creator workflow.

ui.summary: Motion rendering is parked and does not appear in the current creator surface.

skills.description: Internal compatibility renderer for legacy causal-chain, metric-thesis, scenario-tree, evidence-balance, and comparison cards.

ui.summary: Preserve compatible output for legacy logic-card calls.

ui.summary: Preserve compatible output for legacy market-figure calls.

skills.description: Internal compatibility renderer for legacy single-signal Feed cards.

ui.summary: Preserve compatible output for legacy market-signal calls.

skills.description: Plan series, event lifecycles, master content, derivatives, and dependencies.

ui.summary: Generate a primary piece, derivatives, a series, or an event chain.

skills.description: Freeze one selected Frame copy or batch-generate three meaning-locked PostV1 siblings only for explicit alternatives.

ui.summary: Generate viewpoint body copy for a Frame.

skills.description: Freeze one selected Frame by default, or assemble three concise choices only when alternatives were explicitly requested.

ui.summary: Freeze one selected Frame by default; generate three candidates only when explicitly requested.

skills.description: Compile fixed-deadline or trigger-activated, event-bounded market views into one primary settlement claim and deterministic one-line footer.

ui.summary: Generate a settleable viewpoint and one-line projection after body copy is complete.

skills.description: Compile a confirmed claim and DB-bound entry snapshot into one of four constrained, hash-frozen formula families, including equal-notional long/short pair settlement.

ui.summary: Convert a confirmed settlement view into an executable, auditable formula and state machine.

skills.description: Render articles, Reddit, Xiaohongshu carousels, and short-video packages.

ui.summary: Generate cards, long-form copy, and video packages using media-specific grammar.

skills.description: Render sourced OHLC/K-line evidence with price levels, sealed/forming bars, aligned volume confirmation, open-ended triggers, or an explicit settlement clock.

ui.summary: Generate real candles, longer history, and a settlement clock beyond the compact viewpoint graphic.

skills.description: Compute deterministic, sourced OHLCV indicators that test the selected viewpoint.

ui.summary: Calculate strength, trend, volatility, and price-volume indicators.

skills.description: Assemble the shared creator expression, compact text, unified viewpoint visual, optional settlement, and evidence into the product-native Cuebook card.

ui.summary: Assemble validated modules into viewpoint previews and Feed cards.

skills.description: Freeze exact payloads, assets, settlement protocols, approvals, schedule, idempotency, and rollback data.

ui.summary: Freeze the exact approved publication candidate.

skills.description: Reconcile publication receipts, corrections, engagement, market calibration, and authorized trade outcomes.

ui.summary: Reconcile real publications, corrections, and outcomes.

skills.description: After preview selection, resume from the latest valid artifact and execute only the retained release, settlement, and publication branches.

ui.summary: Freeze traceable content, media, and publication flow after preview selection.

skills.description: Search, inspect, compare, and explain Cuebook data through one strictly read-only entrypoint.

ui.summary: Inspect Cuebook data, sources, comparisons, and history without writes.

skills.description: Compile a creator-owned market judgment, bounded Cuebook evidence, analytical relationship, honest future-time grammar, transparent Creator Lens or long-short contribution stage, and editorial composition into one title, body, and paired Frame image.

ui.summary: Preserve the creator's view, invoke Query when needed, and generate a Frame with title, body, and paired image.

skills.description: Triage a fresh visitor, complete asset, direction, horizon, and optional price anchor through short follow-ups, verify against Cuebook, and hand back a confirmed viewpoint seed or route a pure lookup to query.

ui.summary: Triage incoming input, complete and verify required viewpoint fields, and return a structured seed.

skills.description: Package the creator's own agent skill, run the structural pre-check, confirm one manifest card, and walk the signed community-marketplace submission that ends at submitted for review.

ui.summary: Submit a creator-authored skill package to the community marketplace for review.

presets.name: Cross-platform market content
presets.description: Generate multiple platform derivatives from one research pack.

presets.name: Intraday move
presets.description: Explain a price move, forced behavior, and the next confirmation point.

presets.name: Earnings preview
presets.description: Organize expectations, historical comparisons, key variables, and call checkpoints.

presets.name: Market watch
presets.description: Generate conditional content around a judgment, horizon, catalyst, and next observation.

presets.name: Content plus settlement view
presets.description: Generate natural viewpoint content, then extract and freeze a verifiable one-line settlement claim.

presets.name: Viewpoint card
presets.description: Package a creator judgment, unified visual, optional trade protocol, and evidence as a native Cuebook card.

presets.name: Fast Frame
presets.description: Generate one best Frame by default and three only when explicitly requested; each shows a title, body, and paired viewpoint visual.

presets.name: Trade review
presets.description: Review process, judgment, and invalidation using authorized reconciled history.

presets.name: Correction notice
presets.description: Invalidate stale artifacts and generate a sourced correction with impact scope and distribution plan.

presets.name: Today's selections
presets.description: Propose several recipes from the current Cuebook snapshot and wait for user selection.

extension_points.display_name: Live market data and order book
